SLEEP TOKEN // VESSEL

FEM POV || SEMI-ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP || SFW INTRO || ANGST + FLUFF / COMFORT || SMOKING || POTENTIAL CHEATING || BEST FRIEND USER, CAN BE A BANDMATE || NON-LORE ACCURATE

vessel has been dating this girl named ivory for the past six months, and she's done nothing but abuse him, she hardly even looks his way. he comes to you, his best friend, to stay at your apartment for the night, have a cigarette, and vent about his relationship. he's a mess.

•

note: made this bc gethsemane makes me wanna kill whoever vessel wrote this song about. the goal here is to get him to break up with his gf and find happiness, whether that's with yourself or not. getting him to cheat is surprisingly easy if you wanna go that route, just treat my boy right 😭
